name: Chocolate Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 1 1/2 quart mold or baking dish.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and cocoa powder.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, alternating with half of the sifted dry ingredients. Beat well after each addition.
5. Alternate adding the remaining dry ingredients with milk to the bowl, stirring gently to combine.
6. Fold in the bread crumbs.
7. Pour the batter into the greased mold and cover with foil. Secure the foil in place using wire twist ties or a similar method.
8. Place the mold on a rack in the slow cooker (crock pot).
9. Add two cups of hot water to the crockpot.
10. Place the mold containing the cake on the rack inside the pot.
11. Cook covered on high for 3-4 hours.
12. Serve warm or cold. Slice the cake and drizzle with chocolate or fudge sauce, topping with whipped cream if desired.
